en: No, don't bring Hillary. Stephanie. Some cucumber at 2.30.
Stephanie! Thanks. Claire, just tell me where you are.
What the hell has happened? No, don't come! I need you to...
Tell the truth. It's horrendous. It's horrendous. It's modern.
Don't lie! I'm not! I look like a pencil.
You... You don't look like... Don't laugh! It's OK!
ko: 너는 그런 것 같지 않아... 웃지 마! 괜찮아!

en: It's not OK! I'm going to lose my job! Don't lose your job! It's cool!
It's not cool! It's edgy! Oh, fuck off! Oh, it's cheap!
You've been drinking. He gave me champagne before he ruined my life.
That's how they get you. Did you go to Anthony?
Claire! I know. What? You remember what happened to me?
